title: Crowride
content:
When the crow
lands, the
tip of the sprung spruce

bough weighs
so low, the
system so friction-free,

the bobbing lasts
way past any
interest in the subject.
meaning:
A. R. Ammons's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Crowride"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
